questionHtml:
In an experiment to explore the effect of exercise on ventilation rate, a subject breathed into a data logging sensor that measured air flow.

The graphs show the result before the subject exercised and immediately after the exercise had finished.

Predict, with a reason, the effect of exercise on the rate of cell respiration.
markschemeHtml: increased due to increased demand for ATP/energy «from muscle activity»

meta.title: Predict, with a reason, the effect of exercise on the rate of cell respiration.
